next_steps: Perform CT-guided or endoscopic biopsy of the nasopharyngeal mass for histopathology and cultures
Order autoimmune serologic testing including ANCA, IgG4, and ACE levels
Consult infectious disease and rheumatology specialists
Initiate high-dose intravenous glucocorticoids if ANCA-associated vasculitis is highly suspected after biopsy
Perform chest imaging (CT chest) to screen for pulmonary involvement
